notes: Builds an LLM agent + formalizer/verifier pipeline (Soufflé Datalog) and evaluates it on 20 MSAN bugs and 20 program-equivalence queries (from CRQBench/Fbounds-Safety). Includes an ablation on iterative formalization (Mode 1 vs Mode 2). Authors used human/manual judgment to label agent responses as valid/invalid, but this is expert annotation of outputs, not a human-subjects study.
